# Syntavra

Syntavra is a local-first token and context optimization Agent Skill for existing AI coding agents. It is not a replacement coding agent, model or IDE.

It reduces five cost surfaces while preserving exact recovery:

1. MCP/tool discovery schemas
2. repository context and broad file reads
3. terminal and MCP tool output
4. long-session memory and conversation history
5. provider request/cache churn

Canonical repository: https://github.com/Naveax/Syntavra
Version: 0.0.1 pre-release
Canonical skill: skills/syntavra/SKILL.md
Installer package: @syntavra/install
Python package: syntavra-runtime

Public workflow: syntavra setup / status / run / prove
Profiles: minimal / balanced / audit
Compatibility aliases: tiny / optimized / full
Primary certification targets: Codex, Claude Code, Cursor

Measurement levels: PROVIDER_OBSERVED, LOCALLY_TOKENIZED, ESTIMATED, UNKNOWN.
Primary benchmark metric: provider-observed cost per verified successful task.

Important: internal fixtures and synthetic receipts do not prove competitor superiority, live integration, public adoption or production maturity.

- Complete competitive feature set: docs/COMPLETE_COMPETITIVE_FEATURE_SET_001.md
